question: command to login in nodes via lla
answer:
The command to login in nodes via LLA is:

commands to login in nodes/switches via its ipv6 - ssh userid@[ipv6_address]

Note: if you able to login in tor1 and not tor2 or vice-versa
login in tor1(tor1) , run (net show clag)
you can take ipv4 of tor2 from tor1 and  make last digit of that ip as 2, login it using that ipv4 (ssh cumulus@169.254.1.2) and reboot tor2
